$comment: Required-field contract for FieldCompletenessValidator. Consumed by FieldRepairPipeline to auto-fill missing fields after every AI turn. Fields listed here are expected to be non-empty strings / non-NaN numbers / non-empty arrays; placeholders ('待生成', '暂无', '未知' etc.) are treated as missing. NSFW-only paths live under each entity's `nsfw` array and are only validated when 系统.nsfwMode=true. Privacy 私密信息 has its own deeper per-field contract in PrivacyProfileValidator — this file intentionally does NOT duplicate it; we only flag 私密信息's mere existence here and let the specialist validator run next.
